title: PulseCRM Ticket
description: Generic ticket schema for the triager. Map these onto your tracker's fields. All vocabulary is intentionally product-neutral; customize the enums in config.example.yaml.

component.description: Generic component tags; list defined in config.

source.description: Bot = from an AlertEnvelope; Internal Triage = staff channel.

reporter.description: DisplayName (@handle) for Bot; staff name for Internal Triage.

kb_article.description: Related knowledge-base article id/url, if matched.

regression.description: Set New on creation; lifecycle owned by the regression-classifier skill.

contact.description: Optional reporter contact, filled by an enricher/lookup. Leave empty if unknown.

last_reported_date.description: Date of the most recent report.
